plugins.name: artemis-transmission-protocol
plugins.description: Structured agent-to-agent communication via the Artemis Transmission Protocol (ATP).

plugins.name: atp-provenance-logging
plugins.description: Line-item action provenance for ATP agents (parent + child prov_id in agent_logs; halt-and-alert on log failure).

plugins.name: agent-scaffolder
plugins.description: Scaffold AI agents from an Agent Card; generates system prompts and index.md / AGENTS.md / .codex/instructions.md.

plugins.name: ramble-on
plugins.description: Signal translation layer for fast, non-linear thinkers. Converts raw rambles, voice-note transcripts, and stream-of-consciousness input into polished notes, ATP blocks, or platform-ready posts — with a bundled MCP server for Notion KB context and voice-model retrieval.
